text.title: llm-observability-stack Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for llm-observability-stack as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Sampling all traces at <100% in development.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Development traffic is low enough to sample at 100%. Sampling misses the exact anomalous call you need to debug. Reserve sampling strategies (e.g., 10%) for high-volume production only.

failure-mode.description: Using Prometheus counters for LLM cost without per-model labels.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A single llm_cost_usd counter masks model mix. If GPT-4o spikes while GPT-4o-mini stays flat, an unlabeled counter hides the root cause. Always include model and provider labels.

failure-mode.description: Only alerting on error rate, ignoring quality score drift.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Quality regressions (relevance drop, hallucination increase) do not surface as HTTP errors. They show up as user churn. Quality alerts require LLM-as-judge sampling running continuously in production.
